testcase.name: test_virtual_scroll_manager_architecture

failure.message: AssertionError: core/virtual_scroll_manager.py VIOLA FRONTEIRA ARQUITETURAL: Importa tkinter: ['tkinter'] VirtualScroll com dependencia de UI pertence a ui/, nao a core/. assert not ["Importa tkinter: ['tkinter']"]

testcase.failure: tests\integration\test_virtual_scroll_core_boundary.py:38: in test_virtual_scroll_manager_architecture assert not violations, ( E AssertionError: core/virtual_scroll_manager.py VIOLA FRONTEIRA ARQUITETURAL: E Importa tkinter: ['tkinter'] E VirtualScroll com dependencia de UI pertence a ui/, nao a core/. E assert not ["Importa tkinter: ['tkinter']"]
